issues.title: spring-ai-starter-stability-ai is not managed in the BOM
issues.body:
Hello!

The [stability-ai-starter](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/spring-ai-spring-boot-starters/spring-ai-starter-stability-ai/pom.xml) is not managed in the BOM.

I think that's an oversight.

comments.body: Thanks, it is an oversight!  Will fix.
